sources.title: The St. Valentine's Day Massacre ( 1967) Original Trailer [ HD]
sources.description: The St. Valentine's Day Massacre (1967) Original Trailer [HD]

metadata.Plot: Chicago February 14th 1929. Al Capone finally establishes himself as the city's boss of organised crime. In a north-side garage his hoods, dressed as policemen, surprise and mow down with machine-guns the key members of Bugs Moran's rival gang. The film traces the history of the incident, and the lives affected and in some cases ended by it.
metadata.Actors: Jason Robards, George Segal, Ralph Meeker
